title: erodium hoefftianum subsp. neilreichii
intro: Erodium hoefftianum subsp. neilreichii is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae, commonly known as the mountain crane's-bill. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Erodium hoefftianum subsp. neilreichii include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and soothing respiratory problems, making it a valuable herbal remedy. In herbal preparations, Erodium hoefftianum subsp. neilreichii can be used as a decoction, infusion, or topical ointment, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
